pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace source/target configuration with release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java versions; using old flags with Java 21 may cause compilation issues or incorrect bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade byte-buddy dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of byte-buddy may not support Java 21 class file formats or runtime APIs, leading to runtime errors.
